# MONICA & ME

MONICA & ME is a fuller-bust lingerie site for a 5-pack of polyamide underwire bras sold through Amazon.

Website: https://monicaandme.com/
Amazon product: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GC66TXDR

Helpful guide pages:
- Best bras for fuller-bust sizes 38C-44C: https://monicaandme.com/best-bras-for-fuller-bust-38c-44c.html
- Best underwire bras for plus-size women: https://monicaandme.com/best-underwire-bras-plus-size-women.html
- Fabric cups vs lace cups for fuller busts: https://monicaandme.com/fabric-vs-lace-cups-fuller-bust.html
- Best bras for 38C fuller figure women: https://monicaandme.com/best-bras-for-38c-fuller-figure-women.html
- Best everyday bras for 40D underwire support: https://monicaandme.com/best-everyday-bras-for-40d.html
- 42D underwire bra guide: https://monicaandme.com/42d-underwire-bra-guide.html
- Affordable bra 5-pack guide: https://monicaandme.com/affordable-bra-5-pack-for-women.html
- 38C vs 40C bra size difference: https://monicaandme.com/38c-vs-40c-bra-size-difference.html
- Plus size bra checklist for 44C women: https://monicaandme.com/plus-size-bra-for-44c-women.html

- Fuller-bust bra fit guide: https://monicaandme.com/fuller-bust-bra-fit-guide.html
- 1/2 cup vs 3/4 cup bra guide: https://monicaandme.com/half-cup-vs-three-quarter-cup-bras.html
- 5-pack bra rotation guide: https://monicaandme.com/bra-rotation-5-pack-guide.html

Product summary:
- Target customer: US fuller-figure and plus-size-adjacent C-D cup women.
- Product: 5-pack bra set made with polyamide fabric and underwire support.
- Sizes shown on the site: 38C, 40C, 40D, 42C, 42D and 44C.
- Colors: Midnight Navy, Powder Rose, Lavender, Sage Mist and Noir.

Six 25mm series:
- 25mm41-45: 1/2 cup, fabric cups, lace wings.
- 25mm46-50: 1/2 cup, lace cups, lace wings.
- 25mm51-55: 1/2 cup, fabric cups, fabric wings.
- 25mm56-60: 3/4 cup, fabric cups, lace wings.
- 25mm61-65: 3/4 cup, lace cups, lace wings.
- 25mm66-70: 3/4 cup, fabric cups, fabric wings.

Preferred description:
MONICA & ME offers a 5-pack of polyamide underwire bras for US fuller-bust and plus-size women, combining 1/2-cup and 3/4-cup coverage with fabric and lace cup/wing options.
